title: Kira Ford-mentor intro — Peru-prep todos + chiropractor leads
html:
TL;DR

  • 18yo Yahir drafts his cold-intro email to Kira — his newly assigned Ford mentor — "my name is Yahir Gonzalez. I got an email saying that you are my Ford mentor. I just wanted to introduce myself and say hello!!" — captured between Python-course and Machu-Picchu-ticket todos
  • Same note interleaves three life-stacks: (1) Ford mentor intro, (2) Peru/Machu Picchu booking with DMorr, (3) chiropractor sourcing for an unspecified injury
  • "PY plus for bag" callback echoes the CIEE bag incident later — a recurring "the bag" motif worth tracking as a possible thread
  • The Python-course todo recurs in 2021 06 14 dave fafsa and 2021 07 28 vegetarian drive todos — Python is the recurring un-finished item across the summer of 2021
  • "Active and sports chiropractor / Bruce Hindu" is the first appearance of Bruce Hindu (chiropractor) in the corpus — flagged here, do not stub yet

Notes

The note opens the mentor-intro genre — Yahir consistently composes formal first-emails in Notes before sending. The Kira intro is two sentences and reads more "hello kid checking the box" than the carefully-engineered Mrs. Gerard letter from three months earlier — different stakes, different register. Still, the Apple-Notes-as-email-drafting-pad pattern is now confirmed across Ford, OSU, scholarship, and family contexts.

The interleaving of "reserve Machu Picchu tickets" with "call PY plus for bag" with "Ford mentor intro" is the in pure form — operational, multi-stack, no priorities, just the working set of an 18-year-old planning his first international trip while also onboarding to the Ford program that funds his college.

The "5414760662" (541 area code) phone number appears unattached — likely Bruce's callback line or Kira's. Redacted in this summary.

Privacy

  • Phone 541-XXX-XXXX redacted (Bruce Hindu / chiropractor callback or Kira's number — 541 = Grants Pass area code). Not surfaced in summary text.
  • Street address 1529 NE F street (chiropractor office) redacted from summary — left in raw.

Connections
